description: This file contains Python source code implementing mapping functions between database ORM models and API schema models, specifically for recipes and reviews in a food recipe backend system. It includes helper functions for CSV handling, functions to generate output schemas, and functions to update ORM objects based on request bodies.

methods.name: Optional[List[str]] _split_csv(csv: Optional[str])
methods.description: Splits a CSV string into a list of trimmed strings, or returns None if input is None or empty.

methods.name: Optional[str] _join_csv(items: Optional[List[str]])
methods.description: Joins a list of strings into a CSV string, after cleaning whitespace and ignoring empty strings.

methods.name: RecipeOut recipe_to_out(db: Session, recipe: Recipe)
methods.description: Converts a Recipe ORM object into a RecipeOut schema, including computed rating statistics.

methods.name: RecipeSummaryOut recipe_to_summary_out(db: Session, recipe: Recipe)
methods.description: Converts a Recipe ORM object into a RecipeSummaryOut schema with summary details.

methods.name: Tuple[Optional[float],int] _rating_stats(db: Session, recipe_id: str)
methods.description: Calculates average rating and ratings count for a given recipe_id from the database.

methods.name: ReviewOut review_to_out(review: Review)
methods.description: Converts a Review ORM object into a ReviewOut schema.

methods.name: None apply_recipe_body_to_orm(recipe: Recipe, *, body)
methods.description: Updates fields of a Recipe ORM object based on a request body, handling optional updates.

methods.name: None replace_ingredients_and_steps( recipe: Recipe, *, ingredients: List[IngredientIn], steps: List[StepIn], new_id_fn, )
methods.description: Replaces the ingredients and steps collections of a recipe with new ones, using provided ID generator.

ctags.name: replace_ingredients_and_steps
ctags.signature: ( recipe: Recipe, *, ingredients: List[IngredientIn], steps: List[StepIn], new_id_fn, )
